description_long: This house features a Mediterranean-inspired design with light-colored stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, and a spacious two-story layout. The main building is complemented by a detached garage with a matching tiled roof and a paved courtyard area adorned with potted plants and small trees. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light, while balconies and rooftop terraces offer outdoor living spaces. The entryway is marked by a covered porch supported by columns and a set of steps leading up to the main door. The property is landscaped with greenery, including a prominent tree and decorative shrubs. The overall structure combines both modern and traditional Mediterranean architectural elements, creating a warm and inviting residential environment.
description: A two-story Mediterranean-style house with stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, large windows, balconies, and a detached garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery and potted plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and the detached garage to the left, along with a tree and potted plants.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the large windows, rooftop terrace, and the courtyard area with multiple potted plants and the garage in the background.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the balconies, additional entry points, and the arrangement of greenery, with the garage and a tree visible to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back facade, rooftop terrace, and the garage, with minimal windows and a tree to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, tiled steps, and a prominent main door beneath a terracotta overhang
